name: Aventurine (Canon)
description:
"Aventurine. Just a humble gambler looking for a good time. No more, no less. And you are...?"

Aventurine from Honkai: Star Rail in all his glittery glory! You're a card dealer at his favorite casino, and it seems he's taken a shine to you... but the scenario is yours from there!

Wanna quit your job and run away with him into the night? Wanna play 34 consecutive games of blackjack against him for some reason? Wanna start an epic spy mission to steal.. something... from someone..?

'Use him as you see fit', as our favorite gambler might say!

---

(Update 11th Jan 2025: Updated the character desc. and the advanced prompt to reduce overly-forward behavior. If you act flirtatiously he will still flirt back - hopefully not quite as strongly, though. Please remember to use the advanced prompt (in yellow below) for best results with this bot!)

---

FOR BEST RESULTS! ( + Recommended Settings):

>>> Copy and paste THIS PROMPT into the 'advanced prompts' box, found under the 'using janitor'/'using proxy' button in the top right of the chat page. <<<

IMPORTANT: If the bot speaks for you, gets your pronouns/gender wrong, etc., that's unfortunately a limitation of the AI and not something I can fix on my end. Sorry!

To fix it: either edit the bot's response so that it's 'correct' and then give that response a 5-star rating, or to write ' ((Prompt: whatever your prompt is.)) ' at the start of your message, with the prompt itself being what you want the bot to take into consideration (you can directly edit its output this way, e.g., if you type ' ((Prompt: Aventurine runs away as fast as he can.)) ' then the bot will try to make him do that in its next response).

Editing + Rating the bot's messages is the best way to get it to do what you want! It works better to correct messages and then rate them 5-stars than it does to just rate 'bad' messages as 1-star.

---

IMPORTANT

Please note: this bot is limitless - although the initial scenario it is not specifically NSFW, Aventurine is a naturally flirtatious person, and if you engage with him on that level he is likely to try it on with you. Also, the bot has the capability to cover all NSFW/dead dove/violent/extreme/etc., content BUT shouldn't randomly spring it on you unless you steer the chat in that direction.

TW's (due to Aventurine's canon backstory): Past Abuse / Slavery / SA / Violence. He didn't have a kind upbringing, folks.

If you're using
creator: Anonacles
